chunks.text: The EECS Department has a long history of faculty members dedicating their time and energy to administrative positions serving the department. The faculty chairs and vice chairs, along with top staff members, focus on the department’s larger goals and ensure that all faculty, students and staff can continue to work together in the most productive ways possible.
chunks.question: What is the role of faculty chairs and vice chairs in the EECS Department?
chunks.answer: Focus on larger goals and ensure productive collaboration.

chunks.text: Department Chairs: Jelani Nelson (EECS Department Chair), Ana Claudia Arias (EE Division Chair), John Wawrzynek (CS Division Chair).
chunks.question: Who are the current EECS Department Chairs?
chunks.answer: Jelani Nelson, Ana Claudia Arias, John Wawrzynek.

chunks.text: Student Affairs: Josh Hug (CS Division Vice Chair, Undergraduate Study), Robert Pilawa-Podgurski (EE Division Vice Chair, Undergraduate Study), Joseph Gonzalez (CS Division Vice Chair, Graduate Matters), Ali Javey (EE Division Vice Chair, Graduate Matters), Sanjit Seshia (Vice Chair, Masters Degree Programs), Alvin Cheung (Vice Chair, Masters Degree Programs), Antoine Davis (Executive Director, Student Affairs).
chunks.question: Who oversees undergraduate and graduate student affairs in EECS?
chunks.answer: Josh Hug, Robert Pilawa-Podgurski, Joseph Gonzalez, Ali Javey.

chunks.text: External Relations: Ion Stoica (CS Division Vice Chair, External Relations), Bennett Agnew (Director, External Relations).
chunks.question: Who handles external relations for the EECS Department?

chunks.text: Administration: Josephine Williamson (Director, Administrative Services, outgoing), Eric Fraser (Director, Information Technology), Logan Baldini (Director, Facilities & Capital Projects), Faye Chou (Director, Administrative Services).
chunks.question: Who are the administrative leaders in the EECS Department?
chunks.answer: Josephine Williamson, Eric Fraser, Logan Baldini, Faye Chou.
